indication: Retsevmo as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adults and adolescents 12 years and older with advanced RET fusion-positive thyroid cancer who are radioactive iodine-refractory (if radioactive iodine is appropriate).
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has conditionally authorized selpercatinib for the treatment of adult and adolescent (12 years and older) patients with advanced RET fusion-positive thyroid cancer who are radioactive iodine-refractory (if radioactive iodine is appropriate).

document.name: Retsevmo (selpercatinib) [product information]. EMA.
